name: Prétorien Exo
description: Garde du corps du Haut Commandement en exosquelette lourd renforcé. Double mitrailleuse électromagnétiques montées sur les épaules. Protocole zéro-tolérance : aucune menace ne passe sa ligne.
prompt: Sci-fi dark conceptual art, Martian Purist faction, aggressive high-tech brutalism. Sleek matte crimson red and obsidian black armor and plating. Sharp angular designs, imposing wedge shapes, completely devoid of soft curves. Faceless dehumanizing visors, glowing neon red energy accents, clean pristine surfaces with zero exposed wiring. Heavy exoskeleton trooper with twin shoulder-mounted electromagnetic machine guns, imposing standing guard pose, ornate angular armor details.
